description: Gift set - Wallet, Planner, Pen Cover and key chain Perfect gift set for the man of style. The sleek cabarelli wallet crafted from pure leather, slim enough to slip inside the jacket or hip pocket without spoiling the silhouette of your ensemble is the highlight of this gift set. Adds a quirky yet classy aesthetic into your sartorial choice for the day, when you snap this wallet out. The set also has a matching daily planner, card holder and pen cover. The entire gift set is packaged in a lovely wooden box with a steel latch and has the branding printed on the top. Wallet Dimensions: 10.5 cm x 8.5 cm Smooth leather upper with fabric lining Two-fold wallet with a flap Two main compartments Two card holders and an id card holder on the left fold and a buttonable coin pocket on the right One slip pocket on left fold and two on the right Three card holders and one id holder on the flap Daily Planner Dimensions: 14 cm x 19 cm Leather bound planner for 2012 with an address book, diary and a business organizer Has a flap to secure it, with a magnetic clasp Pen Cover Leather pen cover with a flap and loop closure Branding embossed on the upper Card Holder Dimensions: 10 cm x 6 cm Rectangular card holder with an openable flap that has a magnetic closure Care Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
